subject: Re:
body:
what are you doing... did you finish last week?,, send more photos, and tell me what you are thinking,

2008/6/27 J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>:

jail for a year..

Hmmmm what kind of forced vacation..doesn,t sound very good! I hope everything is fine! I`m in paris for the moment, I came for a job and after a week I`m going back home!
take care
